title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi, an insurtech startup founded by Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, rebuilt insurance industry infrastructure from the ground up rather than modernizing legacy systems. The founders emphasize pursuing ambitious versions of ideas and questioning entrenched industry defaults, creating a two-year competitive moat that attracted $108M in Series A funding.
